pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states 'You are a data engineer'
O*NET database maps 15-1243.00 to Database Architects, which includes Data Engineer as an alternate title.
Task description explicitly sets the context as an 'energy utility'.
SOC code 15-0000 designates Computer and Mathematical Occupations.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh and pipeline files which utilize pandas for time-series aggregation and tariff boundary evaluations.
Explicitly defined in verifier.py logic where score >= 60 results in a pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated 60-day minute-level smart meter telemetry data simulating European date formats and winter heating drift. The agent must resolve 5 specific pandas-based pipeline bugs related to data parsing, imputation, aggregation, tariff boundaries, and adaptive anomaly detection, correctly evaluating to a pass threshold of 60.
